title: Insane SMP
description: A InSaNE Modpack for you and your friends support us by playing it.
body:
🧠 MC INSANE – Welcome to the Madness.

Version: 1.19.2
Type: Chaos | Exploration | Technology | Magic | Hardcore Survival

🔥 What is MC INSANE?

MC INSANE is not for the faint of heart. This is Minecraft turned up to 1000%—a chaotic, ultra-modded experience where literally everything wants you dead, the world is barely holding itself together, and you're given the tools to dominate it all... if you survive




Links:|MojoLauncher:https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/123ar2rODG8phinJZ6ZC510zNQSwfYGQo  |
